name: TREK
short_desc: Self-hosted travel and trip planner with real-time collaboration
author: liketrek
description: TREK is a self-hosted travel and trip planner with real-time collaboration, interactive maps, PWA support, SSO, budgets, packing lists and more. Plan your trips, organise itineraries and collaborate with fellow travellers, all from your own server.

form_fields.label: Encryption key
form_fields.hint: Used to encrypt stored secrets (API keys, MFA, SMTP, OIDC) at rest. Equivalent to `openssl rand -hex 32`.
